title: verbascum boerhavii var. portae
intro: Verbascum boerhavii var. portae is a flowering plant also known as Mullein, which belongs to the figwort family. The plant's leaves and flowers are used medicinally, and it's valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Mullein has various health benefits, including soothing respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and alleviating anxiety and insomnia, due to its sedative effects. The leaves can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, or salves, and the flowers can be used to make a soothing oil that can be applied topically to skin irritations.
